labels.label: primary
labels.reason: Defines the UnknownSyntax(String) variant with #[error("unknown syntax: '{0}'")] via thiserror — the exact string lives here.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Raises Error::UnknownSyntax(name) when a requested syntax name cannot be found in the syntax set during resolution.

labels.label: primary
labels.reason: Defines InvalidPagerValueBat variant with #[error("Use of bat as a pager is disallowed in order to avoid infinite recursion problems")] — the exact string lives here.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Raises Error::InvalidPagerValueBat inside try_pager when PagerKind::Bat is detected as the configured pager.

labels.label: primary
labels.reason: Defines LineRange struct (lower/upper bounds), LineRange::from/parse_range, and RangeCheckResult; also defines LineRanges (a Vec<LineRange>) and its check() method.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Uses RangeCheckResult from line_range to decide per-line visibility within run_with_error_handler; imports LineRanges via Config.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Stores VisibleLines::Ranges(LineRanges) or DiffContext in Config, and HighlightedLineRanges for the highlight-range feature.

labels.label: primary
labels.reason: Defines Controller struct with config and assets fields, and its run / run_with_error_handler methods that orchestrate the full rendering pipeline.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Instantiates Controller::new with the built Config and HighlightingAssets, then calls controller.run(inputs, …) as the top-level dispatch.

labels.label: primary
labels.reason: Defines pub enum MappingTarget (MapTo/MapToUnknown/MapExtensionToUnknown) and SyntaxMapping struct with custom_mappings: Vec<(GlobMatcher, MappingTarget)>.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Calls syntax_mapping to resolve MappingTarget for a given file path during syntax detection.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Calls syntax_mapping.insert(pattern, MappingTarget::MapTo(syntax)) when registering user-provided --map-syntax rules from matches.

labels.label: primary
labels.reason: InteractivePrinter implements the per-line highlighting pipeline: syntect HighlightLines, ANSI escape construction, line number and grid decorations.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Provides HighlightingAssets containing the SyntaxSet and ThemeSet that InteractivePrinter uses to highlight each line.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Constructs InteractivePrinter and drives the line-by-line print loop via printer.print_line and printer.print_header/footer.

labels.label: primary
labels.reason: Defines OutputType enum (Pager / Stdout), from_mode, try_pager, and the pager launch logic including less argument construction.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Implements get_pager, PagerKind detection, PagerSource priority (config → BAT_PAGER → PAGER → default), and pager argument helpers used by try_pager.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Calls OutputType::from_mode inside run_with_error_handler to decide whether to spawn a pager before processing inputs.

labels.label: primary
labels.reason: Defines SyntaxMapping struct, MappingTarget enum, make_glob_matcher, and the insert/get/get_extension methods that match file paths to syntax names.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Provides the BUILTIN_MAPPINGS array of (glob, MappingTarget) pairs that SyntaxMapping loads as default built-in rules.

labels.label: primary
labels.reason: Defines build_app() with all flag definitions: --language, --theme, --style, --line-range, --color, --paging, --map-syntax, --diff, etc.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Implements App::matches_to_inputs and App::config to convert clap ArgMatches into bat::Config and Vec<Input>, including all flag reads.

labels.label: primary
labels.reason: Defines HighlightingAssets with syntax_set_cell, serialized_syntax_set, theme_set, and fallback_theme; provides get_syntax_for_path, get_theme, and syntax_set methods.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Receives &HighlightingAssets in Controller::new and passes it to InteractivePrinter::new for every input processed.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: InteractivePrinter stores &HighlightingAssets and calls assets.get_theme and assets.syntax_set in its constructor.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Implements assets_from_cache_or_binary and clear_assets — the construction and cache-management path for HighlightingAssets in the binary.

labels.label: primary
labels.reason: Defines Config<'a> struct (library-level) with all rendering options: language, theme, style, line_ranges, paging_mode, tab_width, wrapping_mode, etc.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Receives &Config<'a> in Controller::new; reads paging_mode, visible_lines, language, and other fields throughout run_with_error_handler.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: InteractivePrinter::new reads tab_width, wrapping_mode, nonprintable_notation, style_components, highlight_ranges from Config.

labels.label: primary
labels.reason: Orchestrates the full rendering pipeline in run_with_error_handler: opens each input, selects syntax via assets, chooses OutputType, constructs InteractivePrinter, and drives the line loop.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Defines Input and InputReader; OpenedInput wraps the opened file reader that controller passes to the printer.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: InteractivePrinter renders each line with syntax highlighting, decorations, and ANSI output as called by controller.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: HighlightingAssets provides syntax and theme resolution called by controller during printer construction.

labels.label: supporting
labels.reason: Entry point: constructs Config and HighlightingAssets, resolves inputs from matches, then calls controller.run(inputs, …).
